body_excerpt: In ctl_elem_read_user, ctl_elem_write_user of control_compat.c, there is a possible memory corruption due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
